result.text: Slow contact ahead: an agricultural vessel at {n:14-22} miles per hour. It is in no hurry. It has never been in a hurry. We will be behind it for some time. Scan its cargo, or embrace the slowness?

moveon.text: The vessel drifts out of optimal range. Its secrets remain its own. For now.

cargo.text: Cargo: {pick:hay, architecturally stacked|seed for next season|one very comfortable farm dog}. Also detected: a wave forming. The farmer is about to wave. Prepare response?

waved.text: Wave exchanged at full amplitude. Rural diplomacy: flawless. The tractor pulled aside at the next wide spot. A gentleman of the road.

nodded.text: Solemn nod delivered and returned. Two vessels acknowledging the ancient contract of the road. The hay approves.

slow.text: Slowness embraced. For three minutes we lived at tractor speed and saw {pick:a hawk|the texture of the fields|our own thoughts, finally}. The universe was not in a hurry either.
